name: @ministryofmany/rln
description: Self-contained Semaphore v3 + RLN (rate-limiting nullifier) package. Privately bundles Semaphore v3 + rlnjs 3.2.0 + the depth-20 circuit and exposes a bigint-only surface: rate commitment, RLN nullifier, Shamir recovery, signal hash, the depth-20 Merkle root, and the v3 identity-secret derivation/deserializer. Never exports a Semaphore Group or Identity object.
author: AtHeartEngineer
